title: APA Site Choice Transformer
summary: Co-led a 5-person team at the Toronto Bioinformatics Hackathon 2025 (2nd place). Built and trained a DNABERT-2 model with PyTorch + Hugging Face on ~800k labeled sequence windows using A100 GPUs.
tools: Python · PyTorch · Hugging Face · GCP · AWS · Git LFS

title: CreditCombo — Credit Card Rewards Optimization Engine
summary: Built a polished static web app with a cap-aware optimization engine that models card setups under real constraints, including guided onboarding, deep-link state transfer, and responsive computation via Web Worker.
tools: JavaScript · HTML/CSS · JSON · Web Workers · Cloudflare Workers
